prompt: A surreal but physically plausible landscape where many small groups of people are walking uphill on individual small slopes or hills. Each group appears to be clearly ascending their local terrain. However, when viewed as a whole, the entire landscape forms a larger slope that is descending in the opposite direction, creating a contradictory global structure. No text, no symbols, no diagrams. Cinematic lighting, realistic textures, wide-angle composition, strong depth of field. The scene should feel natural at first glance, but increasingly unsettling as the viewer notices the contradiction between local and global directions. Single frame, carefully composed to emphasize both local and global perspectives simultaneously.
visual_logic: People walk uphill on local slopes, but the entire landscape slopes downward globally, showing how local trends reverse when combined.
